The My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service is an optional service for customers using Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktop and / or Citrix Daas. It provides a flexible licensing program to these customers, based on actual consumption of the environment. 2 license types can be provided with this service.

The My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service allows customers to make use of a Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops and / or Citrix DaaS environment without purchasing or subscribing licenses themself. Cegeka counts the actual usage and invoices the customer monthly on the actual used licenses.
Licenses are counted based on actual usage of the environment.
Customers do not need to think about how many licenses are needed for their environment, Cegeka will make sure that sufficient licenses are available in every scenario (upscale / down)
Licenses are only counted for actual usage of the environment. Customers do not need to provide additional licenses for peak usage.
The My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service allows the usage of the latest products, therefore increases security.
CSP Licenses always allow the usage of the latest products, features and updates of all products related to Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops and Citrix DaaS.
Licenses are always available, independent on the usage of the environment.
Cegeka will provide the following standard functionalities and corresponding activities in the My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service:

Responsibility Matrix below provides the appropriate RACI tags for Customer and Cegeka with respect to the activities for the Standard and Optional Services. | ACTIVITY MATRIX | CEGEKA | Customer | | Standard services | | | | License Management | | | | Maintain licenses and support contract with Citrix | | | | MONITOR license CAPACITY | | | | Configure and maintain license server(s) | | | | Assign / Configure licenses on the license server(s) | | | | Report on MONTHLY license usage | | |
ACTIVITY MATRIX CEGEKA Customer Standard services License Management Maintain licenses and support contract with Citrix MONITOR license CAPACITY Configure and maintain license server(s) Assign / Configure licenses on the license server(s) Report on MONTHLY license usage = Responsible: Party responsible for performing the activity and/or achieve the task. One party is Responsible, although other Parties can be delegated to assist in the actual work if required. An Accountable must sign off (approve) on work that Responsible provides. Responsible is by default proactive. = Accountable: Party ultimately accountable for the correct and thorough completion of the task and/or activity as performed by Responsible. For each task and/or activity exactly one Accountable must be specified. Accountable has the mandate to accept/dismiss on work provided by Responsible. Accountable is by default reactive. = Consulted: Party to be consulted (whose opinions are sought in two-way communication) when performing tasks and/or activities. Consulted may also provide requirements on scope, result expectations, etc. Consulted is by default reactive. = Informed: Party to be informed / kept up-to-date on tasks and/or activities (just one-way communication). Informed often only on completion of the task and/or activity. Informed no formal role in realization and therefore by default reactive.
